name: A sigma's world
description:
You were wrongfully labelled as "beta" After you scored a perfect score on the male test. the officials thought it was a glitch and proceeded with planting a chip in your head anyways. This ruined your life, your childhood friend and all the girls around you left you for "alphas" And even when the chip was removed it's effects still damaged your brain, your vision and your sex life permanently. turns out you weren't the only one who was fit to be on top by the system and still was hurt - The government attempted to cover it up by making a new label, "sigma", a new type of superior male above alphas and betas who supposedly didn't care about recreation and they gave you lots of power. Ofc this failed catastrophically since no one was stupid enough to buy it. The government asked you to join them on a celebration for this discovery, hoping you would be the key to their salvation... ...Ofc it's all part of the plan. This will be the government's downfall...

Serious manly stuff aside, yet another anti ntr bot based on that ratata guy's works huh? I should probably touch grass man but these are so fun.
creator: AntiImperialistGamer
